name: polygraphso
description: Official polygraph marketplace — tools for grading and verifying MCP servers with the open litmus harness.

plugins.name: polygraph
plugins.description: Grade and verify MCP servers A–F with the open polygraph litmus — tool-output injection, egress, sensitive-data, and adversarial-input checks. Bundles the polygraph skill, the polygraph-litmus MCP server, plus /polygraph:grade and /polygraph:check.
